           +---------+
           |  Input  |
           +----+----+
                |
+--------[  Process  ]---------+
|               |              |
|               v              |
|          +---------+         |
|          |  Start  |         |
|          +----+----+         |
|               |              |
|       +-------+-------+      |
|       v               v      |
| +----------+    +----------+ |
| |  Path 1  |    |  Path 2  | |
| +-----+----+    +-----+----+ |
|       |               |      |
|       +-------+-------+      |
|               v              |
|           +-------+          |
|           |  End  |          |
|           +---+---+          |
+---------------|--------------+
                |
                v
          +----------+
          |  Output  |
          +----------+
